title: Invite Friends
subtitle: Invite 5 friends and earn 1 free month when paid plans launch

progress.label: Progress toward your next free month

share.whatsapp_message: Hey! Try 9anon AI for your legal questions — the smartest legal assistant. Sign up with my link:

step1.title: Share your link
step1.desc: Send your personal referral link to friends, family, or colleagues via WhatsApp or any other channel

step2.title: They sign up
step2.desc: When someone creates a new account using your link, it is automatically counted as a valid referral

step3.title: You earn your reward
step3.desc: Every 5 successful referrals = 1 full free month on any paid subscription plan when we officially launch

reward.label: Reward condition
reward.note: Rewards are applied automatically to your account when paid plans launch — no action needed
